The most common ancestry, found in every corner of the world. Humans are adaptable and resilient, with a wide range of appearances and cultures.
origin.townstead_origins.origin.overworl: A native of the surface world, born to a settlement under open sky. Used to the sun and the rain, the overworlder is a hardy soul with a strong connection to the land.
gene.townstead_origins.diurnal.desc: Awake by day, asleep by night.
gene.townstead_origins.human_lifespan.de: Average human lifespan of around 80 years.
